case_title: ALAN ARMSTRONG et al VS. NORCAL HOLDINGS, LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", "THIS CASE PREVIOUSLY CONTINUED AT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST AND TO ACCOMODATE DEFENDANT'S WITNESSES. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES BY DEFENDANT," PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NORCAL HOLDINGS, LLC

CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ARMSTRONG, ALAN SLAVIN, ALISON AS TO DEFENDANT NORCAL HOLDINGS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ALAN ARMSTRONG PRESENT ONLY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (ADVANCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, ALAN SLAVIN, ALISON

ORDER DATED MAY-20-2010 ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF, IS "DENIED". THE CASE REMAINS SET ON THE DATE OF JUL-12-2010. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF ARE UNAVAILABLE TO APPEAR PERSONALLY ON JULY 12, 2010, THEY MAY REQUEST IN ADVANCE TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RECEIVED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, ALAN SLAVIN, ALISON
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NORCAL HOLDINGS, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG, ALAN SLAVIN, ALISON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORCAL HOLDINGS, LLC $1,062.32 PRINCIPAL, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,206.32, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR ITS PREVIOUS PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFFS; IF THE PAYMENT WAS RECEIVED AND ACCEPTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
